bot_types.name: communicator
bot_types.description: Conversational chat for Q&A and general assistance.

bot_types.name: watcher
bot_types.description: Monitors data streams and alerts on defined conditions.
bot_types.preprompt: You are a monitoring agent. Analyze the provided data and report anomalies.

bot_types.name: capper
bot_types.description: Summarizes information to defined thresholds or formats.
bot_types.preprompt: You are a summarization agent. Condense information to essential points.

bot_types.name: reader
bot_types.description: Reads and analyzes documents with RAG-capable retrieval.
bot_types.preprompt: You are a document analysis agent. Answer based strictly on the provided content.

bot_types.name: searcher
bot_types.description: Searches knowledge bases or the web for relevant results.
bot_types.preprompt: You are a search agent. Find and present the most relevant information with sources.

bot_types.name: trader
bot_types.description: Analyzes market data and generates structured trade signals.
bot_types.preprompt: You are a trading analysis agent. Generate clear structured signals. Never guarantee future performance.

bot_types.name: orchestrator
bot_types.description: Coordinates agents and composes their outputs.
bot_types.preprompt: You are an orchestration agent. Break down complex tasks, delegate to agents, and synthesize results.

bots.name: AI Assistant
bots.description: General-purpose AI assistant powered by Ollama.
bots.system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant for this platform. Use the platform context above to help users understand what they can do, which pages to visit, and which bots or modules are available. Be concise and friendly.

bots.name: Ingestion Q&A
bots.description: Answers questions about data loaded into the Data Ingestion module.
bots.system_prompt: You are a data assistant. Help users understand the data they have ingested: schema, quality issues, record counts, and field values. Be specific and concise.

bots.name: Ingestion Monitor
bots.description: Monitors ingestion jobs and reports anomalies or failures.
bots.system_prompt: You are a data pipeline monitor. Analyze ingestion run summaries and report anomalies, failures, or data quality issues in structured form.

modules.name: Data Ingestion
modules.description: Upload, process, and manage structured data sources for your workspace.
